categories.name: Hand Knotted Carpets
categories.description: The pinnacle of rug craftsmanship, featuring dense, intricate patterns bound knot by knot.

categories.name: Hand Woven Rugs
categories.description: Plush, bespoke comfort crafted utilizing a modern tufting gun for versatile design expressions.

categories.name: Dhurrie
categories.description: Timeless, low-profile rugs woven without a pile, perfect for modern and rustic interiors alike.

categories.name: Hand Tufted Carpets
categories.description: Tailor-made designs bringing your unique architectural and interior visions to life.

gallery.title: Circular Tibetan Hand-Knotted
gallery.description: A stunning masterpiece featuring traditional Tibetan motifs, meticulously hand-knotted using hand-spun wool and natural dyes. Its intricate details and rich heritage make it a perfect centerpiece for both classic and contemporary spaces.
features: Knot Count: 100 knots per square inch

gallery.title: Abstract Oushak Overdyed
gallery.description: This overdyed Oushak rug blends antique charm with modern aesthetics. It undergoes a specialized distressing and dyeing process to achieve a vibrant yet faded look that seamlessly integrates into bohemian or minimalist decors.
features: Material: Wool pile on cotton foundation

gallery.title: Vintage Medallion Revival
gallery.description: This hand-knotted carpet captures the elegance of traditional weaving with a contemporary color palette. Each knot is individually tied by skilled artisans, creating a dense and highly durable surface that enhances both texture and detail.
features: Material: Wool pile on cotton foundation

gallery.title: Muted Heritage Lattice
gallery.description: Crafted using time-honored hand-knotting techniques, this carpet reflects a meticulous process where thousands of knots are tied to form intricate patterns. The precision in knot density allows for sharp detailing and a rich surface texture, while the finishing process enhances its soft yet resilient feel.
features: Material: Premium wool with cotton base

gallery.title: Classic Floral Revival
gallery.description: Woven through traditional hand-knotting techniques, this carpet showcases intricate floral motifs formed by individually tying thousands of knots. The high knot density enhances clarity in design while contributing to a durable and richly textured surface. It reflects a harmonious blend of detailed craftsmanship and enduring elegance.
features: Material: Wool pile on cotton foundation

gallery.title: Striped Cotton Dhurrie
gallery.description: This hand-woven dhurrie is crafted on traditional looms using a precise interlacing of warp and weft threads, creating a flat, pile-free surface. The striped pattern is achieved by alternating dyed yarns during the weaving process. Its reversible structure and breathable texture make it a practical choice for both modern and casual living spaces.

gallery.title: Geometric Indigo Dhurrie
gallery.description: Woven on traditional looms using a flatweave technique, this dhurrie features a rhythmic geometric pattern created through precise interlocking of dyed cotton yarns. The absence of pile gives it a smooth, lightweight surface, while the reversible construction enhances versatility and longevity.

gallery.title: Soft Gradient Tufted
gallery.description: This hand-tufted carpet features a seamless gradient design, achieved by carefully blending dyed yarns during the tufting process. Using a tufting gun, artisans insert loops of yarn into a stretched canvas, which are then sheared to create a soft, even pile. The result is  exceptional comfort, making it ideal for contemporary living spaces.

gallery.title: Imperial Oushak
gallery.description: An exquisite handknotted carpet inspired by the timeless Oushak design philosophy. Crafted with a high knot density, this piece offers exceptional detail, durability, and a refined texture underfoot. Its elegant floral patterns and subtle abrashed tones create a harmonious blend of tradition and sophistication, making it ideal for both classic and contemporary interiors
features: Style: Dense, plush pile with a smooth finish

gallery.title: Modern Minimalist Woven
gallery.description: Embodying the essence of Scandinavian minimalism, this hand-tufted rug features a plush, incredibly soft pile. The subtle textured variations and neutral tones create a grounding element for modern interior sanctuaries.
features: Material: Blended New Zealand Wool & Viscose

gallery.title: Geometric Flatweave Dhurrie
gallery.description: Woven on traditional pit looms, this dhurrie showcases a precise interlacing of warp and weft threads without any pile, resulting in a flat, reversible surface. Its lightweight yet durable structure makes it ideal for contemporary spaces seeking both functionality and understated design.

gallery.title: Textured Wool Kilim
gallery.description: This kilim is crafted through a meticulous hand weaving technique where dyed wool yarns are tightly interlocked across vertical warp threads to form intricate motifs. The process requires continuous attention to tension and alignment, resulting in a piece that balances durability with artistic expression.
features: Texture: Flat with slight ribbed detailing
